chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-377 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA No.1559/2024 2. For hearing of main case 15-05-2024 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner does not press instant petition and submits that he would avail remedy before the Civil Court in accordance with law. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed in above terms as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
